# Medux

> Medux is a real-time video and voice calling platform with group calls,
> invite codes, in-call AI assistant, live subtitles, and Amharic
> translation.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and pricing for Medux.
- [Sign in](/login): Existing-user login (email or Google).
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a new Medux account.
